---
description: "Use when editing CodeJam docs, exercise READMEs, prerequisites, or instructor guides. Keeps tutorial flow, do-this-next clarity, and link-first documentation style."
name: "CodeJam Documentation Style"
applyTo: "exercises/**/README.md, README.md, prerequisites.md, InstructorSetup.md, CONTRIBUTING.md"
---
# CodeJam Documentation Style

- Preserve the workshop/tutorial tone: conversational, concise, and action-oriented.
- Keep the “do this next” flow clear; prefer short, sequential steps.
- Use visual callouts consistently with existing docs (for example, 👉 where appropriate).
- Avoid large rewrites when a targeted clarification is enough.
- Prefer links to authoritative sources over duplicating setup or policy content.
  - Setup/environment options: `prerequisites.md`
  - Contribution process and DCO: `CONTRIBUTING.md`
  - Exercise progression: `README.md`
  - Instructor provisioning/cleanup: `InstructorSetup.md`
- Keep terminology aligned with SAP CAP, SAP HANA Cloud, and SAP Business Application Studio naming already used in this repo.
- Validate internal links when moving/renaming sections.
- Do not introduce non-existent tooling guidance (especially for BAS-centric features like graphical calculation view editing).
